meaning: vi.处理,应付过去vt.管理,控制,操纵,维持,运用,搞成,设法,达成
examples: We'll manage as best we can.
How did she manage to struggle free ?
Close attention to detail and quality of work, balanced by ability to manage heavy workload.
Forty Rockwell engineers are on-site to help manage spare parts and train factory workers.
